basic_details.job_title: Allahabad University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Allahabad University Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website allduniv.ac.in. A total of 2 Junior Research Fellow vacancies have been announced through the Allahabad University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree (MSc/MTech) in Atmospheric and Ocean Science/Earth System Science/ Meteorology/ Geophysics/ Geology/ Physics/ Mathematics/ Statistics/ Computer Science OR BE/BTech/MTech degree in Meteorology/ Atmosphere/ Ocean/ Marine/ Mechanical/ Civil/Computer Engineering /Information Technology from Govt. recognized Universities/Institutes, Must have cleared UGC NET/CSIR NET/GATE/National Level Examinations conducted by Central Govt. Departments and their Agencies and Institutions, At least 60% marks at the Under Graduate and Post Graduate degree level (desirable)
qualification.details: Post Graduate Degree (MSc/MTech) in Atmospheric and Ocean Science/Earth System Science/ Meteorology/ Geophysics/ Geology/ Physics/ Mathematics/ Statistics/ Computer Science OR BE/BTech/MTech degree in Meteorology/ Atmosphere/ Ocean/ Marine/ Mechanical/ Civil/Computer Engineering /Information Technology from Govt. recognized Universities/Institutes. Must have cleared UGC NET/CSIR NET/GATE/National Level Examinations conducted by Central Govt. Departments and their Agencies and Institutions. At least 60% marks at the Under Graduate and Post Graduate degree level (desirable).

salary_details.details: Rs.37000+18%HRA (first 2 years) as JRF and Rs.42000 + 18%HRA (3rd year) as SRF

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Allahabad University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Allahabad University Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Allahabad University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Allahabad University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Post Graduate Degree (MSc/MTech) in Atmospheric and Ocean Science/Earth System Science/ Meteorology/ Geophysics/ Geology/ Physics/ Mathematics/ Statistics/ Computer Science OR BE/BTech/MTech degree in Meteorology/ Atmosphere/ Ocean/ Marine/ Mechanical/ Civil/Computer Engineering /Information Technology from Govt. recognized Universities/Institutes. Must have cleared UGC NET/CSIR NET/GATE/National Level Examinations conducted by Central Govt. Departments and their Agencies and Institutions. content_sections.text: Rs.37000+18%HRA (first 2 years) as JRF and Rs.42000 + 18%HRA (3rd year) as SRF

content_sections.heading: Allahabad University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Allahabad University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Allahabad University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Allahabad University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at Allahabad University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at Allahabad University is 14th August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at Allahabad University.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via Email. Candidates need to send their applications to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 37000 - 42000 Per Month, with specific details for JRF and SRF roles mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: A Post Graduate Degree (MSc/MTech) in relevant science or engineering fields and clearing UGC NET/CSIR NET/GATE are essential qualifications.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from any state apply for this position?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for Allahabad University, located in Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh. Candidates from all states are generally eligible if they meet the criteria.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is Contractual.
